title: The Highest Quality Dividend Challenger Summary
text: This article presents the highest-quality Dividend Challengers, companies listed on U.S. exchanges with consistently higher annual dividend payouts for 5-9 years. The top 20 highest-quality Dividend Challengers are identified based on a quality scoring system, with Toronto-Dominion Bank, Dolby Laboratories, and Thermo Fisher Scientific making the top three. The article also highlights stocks trading at favorable valuations and offering compelling metrics for income-focused, growth-oriented, value-driven, and total-return investors.

title: System outage update
text: ATLANTA , Aug. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) provided an update Monday on a technology outage that impacted rail operations: This morning, Norfolk Southern experienced a hardware-related technology outage that impacted rail operations. At this time, we have no indication that this was a cybersecurity incident.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Avoid Norfolk Southern (NSC) Now
text: Low revenues and deteriorating operating ratio are hurting Norfolk Southern's (NSC) prospects.

title: Norfolk Southern appoints Chris Ceraso Vice President, Integrated Resource Planning
text: ATLANTA , Aug. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) today announced that Chris Ceraso has been appointed Vice President Integrated Resource Planning, effective October 1. In this newly established role, Ceraso will be responsible for leading Norfolk Southern's integrated resource planning process.

title: Norfolk Southern to present at Deutsche Bank 2023 Transportation Conference
text: ATLANTA , Aug. 9, 2023  /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) President and Chief Executive Officer Alan H. Shaw and Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Mark George will make a presentation at the Deutsche Bank 2023 Transportation Conference.

title: Transport ETFs in Focus Post Q2 Earnings
text: The second-quarter earnings picture for the transportation sector has also been solid. For a better understanding, let's delve into the results of some well-known industry players.

title: Sell Alert: 3 Transportation Stocks to Dump ASAP
text: The massive U.S. transportation industry has, according to the U.S. Department of Transportation, a net value of transportation infrastructure and vehicles in excess of $10 trillion. In addition, the value of America's transportation capital stock is growing by more than 10% a year.
